column1: Hey Jack, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
sup were you still looking for help from us with spring break?
Cool I got you, all good. which destination were you lookin to book
Which are the most popular for college kids
I'll send both. how many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid bro. you all from the same school?
For the week our spring break is not that many other colleges have it compared to later weeks. Is Punta cana and cancun still the best options or is cabo good to
your week is poppin rn bro
yea fam. which school do y'all go to?
oh bet yea we've had a couple auburn groups come through
y'all def know how to party lol
Did they go to cabo cancun or punta cana
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get started?
Bet yeah Punta would be alot of fun
Anytime we were just starting to figure out who's all going then going to book something
What are the best all inclusive resorts that the most college kids will go to
I'll send over. is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
word whats the best email to send to
just sent that over bro lmk if it came through. threw the cyber week deal in there too. i'll personally be on the occidental punta cana package your week
How much is the cyber deals we get money off
bet. saw you made a reservation from the quote, did you mean to or just clicking around?
Was that for like to buy
yea its a good deal bro fs
yerr Jack whats good bro, how we feelin about the options?
whats good bro checkin in, hows everything lookin on your end for spring break?
Jack brotha whats good, did we wanna make a move on that punta cana option?
whats up Jack did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?
yoo Jack did y'all get to book anything for spring break yet
Yo sorry for not answering the past few weeks i've had hella stuff going on
Me and my friends were talking ab punta cana this week
word, I'll personally be in Punta Cana too so would be dope to have y'all there with me
What days are the best days to go again and what is the better hotel that the most people my age will be at
occidental punta cana is where everyone is gonna be. march 7 and 8 for arrival dates is the hotspot
hey checkin in, we narrow down on which package we wanna roll with?
sup! we still looking to get situated for spring break?
Yeah we're still all deciding as of now
My group is wanting to do a cruise but I wanna go to punta cana so i'm just convincing them to do it instead of a cruise
There just hesitant cause they don't know if there would be tons of people our age at the Occident Punta Cana
Is there somewhere I can look up of what the resort all has to offer
I mean we have a booze cruise event in Punta Cana, maybe its the best of both worlds?
And yo I promise you the occidental punta cana is where its at. theres literally where all of our college groups are
Oh shit wait is that included in the package. What is all included so I can tell them
this whole video is the punta cana trip. pool parties you see are at occidental punta cana. and then some of the nightclub events. also the booze cruise in there too
yea its a good time. they def don't gotta worry about having a good time. I'll actually be there too personally
yoo Jack whats goos bro, how we lookin with spring break?
sup! we still lookin to get situated for spring break?
My friends kinda have put it off but we're really starting to figure it out now. How much is it a person for 4 nights again. What all does it include?
yoo i got you bro, we still thinking punta cana?
bet i'll send you over updated pricing rn, what dates were you looking for again?
word did we know which destination we were leaning towards?
Punta cana and what resort did u say was the best
Yeah the Occidental Punta cana would be good
What's the pricing for it again
Ill send you a sample quote one sec
Does that come with the party cruise or is that added on after
you can add it on after yea. its an open bar booze cruise party. super dope vibe I'll send a video of what it looks like

My friends had some questions. They wanted to know are the rooms only 4 people to each room or if we had 8 people and did 2 rooms they wanted to know if it would be cheaper then or not? Also how much is the booze cruise?
And then clubs wise are there any at the resort or are they all off it?
good question. with 8 we would just do two rooms of 4. pricing will be the same as you see for the 4 person room price
there is a nightclub on the resort. it gets the job done but isnt a miami nightclub by any means
its pretty solid. we also host pool parties on the resort
booze cruise is $75, with bus transportation and open bar
Bet thank you. That's good that there's clubs at the resort. We just would probably have to stay at the resort cause our parents don't want us leaving

you can def get what you need at the resort. the nightclub is open every night. also, if you do the off resort events, we have buses that pick everyone up from the lobby, and drop off right at the nightclub. and we have on site staff with everyone at all times
but there will def be ppl that stay at the resort the whole time

That's good to know if we decided to leave the resort. My friends wanted to know if u knew what all the colleges were that people are coming from and staying at this resort. And then how many like total people estimated
For the same week ours is?
grabbing school names now for your week
and yea that resort is the busiest college spring break resort in Punta Cana
Tennessee, Bama, ECU, UofSC, U Mississippi, FAU, Penn State
Oh shit bet those are good parties schools
Is there people that have already booked the Occidental punta cana from those schools?
all the schools I just named will be at the occidental punta cana
Bet. I thought Bama had the week after our week tho?
like are already booked with us
are they? I may have read that week wrong
Yeah I think there the week after us
Looks like I have one Bama group on the 7th. all the others on the 14th-16th arrival dates
maybe theyre in a specific program or something
Oh damn that's good. Are those all the schools that are gonna be there or just some
bunch more man. literally gonna be ppl from all over
That's gonna be so much fun lemme tell all of my friends that
even more bro theres a long list
for sure fam. ill be there with y'all too
Of those schools is more girls then guys or like what would the ratio be
Lol you seen the vid bro!
Me and my friends are talking it over and talk to there parents tonight and tomorrow then we were gonna prolly book it
Aight bet. Lookin forward to havin yall roll with us man
yoo Jack whats good bro, did we wanna lock down that option?

I think so. We were just figuring it out cause we may have more than 4 people. If we were to have 6 people come could we do 3 and 3 to a room instead of 4 and 2 so it'll be cheaper for everyone instead of the 2 paying more
yea 3 and 3 is the way to go. we can always adjust that as we go tho. we can start with 4 in a room, y'all can secure, and if we have the 2 that want to hop in, we'll split it up to 3 and 3
yerr Jack hope the weekend was good, did we want to get a reservation started?
Yeah we're waiting on to see if one more person is joining us then we were gonna book it
aight bet. it may be best to get the rest of you set up for now. things are def getting slim. dont want you all to miss out
Ok is that same quote/pricing that u sent me the other day still the price
yea Im able to keep the price the same for you
Ok bet so if we do a 3 and 3 in a room the other 5 people will get the same price to
how many ppl we lookin at rn, 11?
oh yea everyone pays the same price. my b didnt mean just you specifically. meant the whole group

Oh ok bet then. So if we then did 3 and 3 in a room. That includes the all inclusive free drinks and food and then transportation to and from the airport? Then would we send you our flight information and is the booze cruise an add on once you get to the resort or can you do it online?

yup includes all of that. you each will have your own slots on the reservation and be able to add your own details and make your own payments. on your specific slot you'll enter your flight info so that we can orchestrate your transportation from the airport and back
for booze cruise you have up to 2 days before your trip to add it onto your account. you can do it all online
Ok bet. So if we do 3 and 3 will both rooms include 2 queen beds a room for the same price
Quick question is there a flight package to or do we just get our own flight
It's def cheaper to get your own flights. I can help you find a good flight to buy tho, like on the side
Just lmk which airport you wanna fly out of
We're trying to fly out of atlanta
check in is 3 but youll still be able to use the resort until rooms are ready. like if you got their a few hours earlier
yoo whats good bro, did we wanna get a reservation set up to lock in that option?

Yeah so me and my one good friend are for sure coming and the other 4 keep just putting it off wanting to do it later but flights keep getting more expensive. I wanted to see if me and my friend start it and do the 2 people per room then the other 4 decide to come can one of them get added into our room?
Yea we can run that play for sure bro
Waiting any longer is risky, even for rooms, things have been selling out
Are there still 2 rooms with 2 queen beds per room available?

Also if we start with the 2 it's more expensive then 3 to a room but if the 4 decided to come and one comes in our room would we get our money back from going from a 2 to 3 people in a room or could we use that money towards the booze cruise
Yea you would just get reimbursed if we were to add other ppl to your room
You could also put it towards the cruise yup
Ok I think it's just gonna be me and one of my friends the other 4 don't want to go
We were gonna book it first thing tomorrow morning
Aight cool yea I'll send over first thing in the am
morning bro, did you want to do 4 nights or 5?
bet bro. will make this reservation right now
I saw the reservation we were looking at going the 8-12 or would the 7-11 be better
7th and 8th are both gucci. whichever you want bro I can just change it rn
most ppl coming in both days

Most likely the 8-12 would be better cause it would be hard for us to get to the airport on the 7th but the flights are looking at little bit cheaper the 7th. My one friends taking a test right now once he's out can I talk to him and we decide
Hey so we decided we were gonna do the 7th-11th because flights are way cheaper then is that okay
yea thats straight bro I'll switch it back
y'all hoppin in on this tn? ops team was asking me whats good earlier today
yes we were ab to book it
aight bet, its all updated now to 7-11
So can we put just $200 down now then then rest when it says or can we put it all down now
you can put it all down now, either or
if its all down now it allows us to get you settled quicker

I noticed on the reservation it said under more details it said this. Pricing may increase for people that enter the reservation after the first deposit date. Since the reservation was yesterday as the first deposit date is it gonna charge us more or are we good
Nah you good bro. the price you see there is the price
Ok bet so for the two of us it'll be 726 right
once you tap in and start making your account youll see it all
I'll update the date to today for you as well
Do I foward the email to my friend so he can access the reservation or can he do it on my computer then just log in
And then when we log back into to our accounts and make payments is that thru the Access Reservation from my email
yea so you can really just send him this link here https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/PHF7TLRJ14
he can follow this link, hit join trip, then hit the join trip button on the TBA slot
he can do it from his own computer or his phone
I totally forgot to pay that last night I have the flu and was sleeping all day. Am I chill if I pay it right now
You good bro yea get it in
Yeah i'm good now I was pretty bad last yesterday
I'm about to to pay the 200 now
Aight bet it's all good to go
Yo is it okay if I pay the remainder tomorrow I have to cash a check from the bank so i'll get the full amount and it closed before my test ended today
yerr whats good brotha, whenever you guys can, if you can put in your flight info so we can schedule your airport transfers
For the insurance part do we have to get it like is it required or do we not have to
Yo do we need to get it or are we good?
I put my flight info in. Will me and my friend get the info for the bus that picks up from the airport
You'll get info on where to find our transportation team members when you land yup
There will be emails sent out soon but it's super easy you can't miss them as you get to he exit
My one friend that i'm going with bought the travel insurance but it keeps saying Error when he puts it in is there anywhere u could check it for him
He's with me in the room
He said it had a problem uploading
yoyo! just emailed over the DR e-ticket link you'll need, and info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
Thank you sorry I didn't see this yesterday. Yes I think we were gonna add the booze cruise
Dope yea the booze cruise is lit for sure
Did you want me to add it in for each of you?
Not yet we're still debating on if i'm trying to get my friend to get it
When's the last day to get it
its up until 48 hours before your trip
So for us it would be by tomorrow then
Can you add it to my account I don't know how to add it. We decided we're gonna do it
Me and my friend can't find it
yoo the booze cruise is added in now, just gotta pay the balance
Did u add the booze cruise on my friends account to
When I go to print out the vouchers and I try to download it as a pdf the QR code doesn't show up
you'll be good with a screenshot tbh bro, its just to verify you got it, we got you on the list ans stuff when you get down here. just make sure you have the screenshot
you'll be good with a screenshot tbh bro, its just to verify you got it, we got you on the list and stuff when you get down here. just make sure you have the screenshot
big day today tho, lets get it!
We just got into our room
Are there any parties or anything going on tonight
Yea we having a block party right outside the lobby after after 8:30
We're in the building 10 so it's right there then
Is the club gonna be the move later
Outside the lobby or on the beach?
yo my b I missed this, the club Mangú is out front of the resort its a building over
we'll be there again tonight def slide through
Are there gonna be any pool parties today or something
Yo! We got DJs setting up at 8:30 on the stage in front of the lobby. And then we'll have them inside Mangú again around 11
For the booze cruise do we just wait in the lobby today?
Yoooooo yea checkin in, yall on?
